titleStmt.title: SII 15.122: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 122. (B.K. No. 206 of 1928-29.) AṆṆĪGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a Slab set up in front of the temple of Pāvaḍi Basappa.

This is dated Śaka 1095, Nandana, Pushya śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. The Śaka year cited coincided with the cyclic year Vijaya. In this year the details of the date save Saṁkrānti correspond to 1173 A.D., December 10, Monday, f.d.t. °35. The Uttarāyaṇa-samkrānti occurred fifteen days later.

It registers a gift of land for ablution, offerings, etc., to the deity, for feeding the ascetics, imparting education and for conducting music, dance and other services in the temple of the god Nāgēśvara at Aṇṇigeṟe, constructed by Nāgagāvuṇḍa of the place. The gift was made under instructions from the king in the presence of Dhannugidaṇḍanāyaka, the governor of Beḷavalanāḍu, and other officers, the Trivarga-samaya, the one Thousand and Pura-paṭṭaṇa. An account of the Kalachuri rulers and of the family of Dhannugi as well as of Nāgagāvuṇḍa is given in some detail. Aṇṇigeṟe is referred to as the rājadhāni of the four ages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīge kulāgāra śayanāgāra harige nūtna ratnāḷige bhāṁḍāgāravidenipudu mahimā gāramapārapūra pārāvā
raṁ . tajjaḷanidhi vaḷayita viḷasejjaṁbūdvīpaṁ jaḷajamadhyastha bhāsvajjaṁbūnadenuyamēṁ pajjaḷipudo mēruka¨rṇnikāka
manīyeṁ . va . Ā mēru rāgiṇīraṁgade dakṣiṇadiśābhāgakkaḷaṁkāramāda bhāratava¨rṣa bhāminiya kuṁtaḷadanta ntamādaku
ntaḷa mahīmaṇḍaḷamaṁ caṇḍavikramadiṁ nijabhujādaṇḍamaṇḍana bhujabaḷa cakrava¨rtti bijjalamahīpāḷananvayābhyuda
yaventene . v® . viprakumāriyo¨rbbaḷolaviṁda mā hāraṁ tānaṟi
diccepe¨rcce baṁda pramitā kaṁ kanasinoḷnereya samāhvayanādanātmajaṁ .
va . Antu . puṭṭi kāḷaṁjarapuravaradoḷu . satata varamāṁ
yaṁ parahitacaritra pātra . Avanata bhuvanaṁ baḷikavana śau[¨ryā] navalakṣavenipa
yava doḷaguṁ māḍi rājyaṁ geyye . . Antiḷā cakravinuta vikra mōnnatiyiṁ negaḷtevetta gaḷacuri kṛṣṇabhūpāḷaniṁ piriyaṁ ta
tkuḷajanitānēka jananāthaṁ prava yadoḷu . kaṁ . Unneti mēruge nija śau¨ryyōnnati
yene kannaman®panāntanamaḷakī¨rttyunnatiyaṁ . v® . pesa¨rvaḍeda¨rttadīya manumā¨rggada bijjarāja ¨rvvasudheyoḷeyde rājasuta¨rbba
ḷikammugi śaṁkava¨rmmanullasadurukī¨rtti nudātta kaḷānidhi ḷājana śau¨ryyarapratimadhai¨ryya nṛpava¨ryya
rādarō . ka . Ā jōgamanṛpavarana tanūjātanajātaśatru kaḷacurikuḷanīrējavana bhānu negaḷdaṁ śrī tanenisipe¨rmmāḍi
nṛpaṁ . tattanayaṁ . ka . nayanani haritanūja riya neneyisuvaṁ
cakrava¨rtti bijjaladēvaṁ . va . Ā cakranātha mauḷimāṇikyana tanūjaṁ . v® . bhūriparā kramakramaṁgaḷēri mahāvibhava pra jaṁ
bhāri da¨rppavairi nṛpasa¨rppasamūhavināśaka sū¨rppakāri sa
dṛśākṛtiyaṁ sale sōvidēvanaṁ . ka . Ā rāyamurāri dharitrīramaṇana daṇḍanātha negaḷdanamaḷayaśōrama
ṇīramaṇanenisi dhannugidēvaṁ . janakaṁ haridēva camūpana tānene dhannugidaṇḍādhīśana janmamaṁ nōḍe nāḍe pāvanama
lte . va . Ā camūnātha lalāmanagrajaṁ . ka . sādhita śatru caritra guṇādhāranudāraṁ kaḷpatarugāṁbhī¨ryyāṁbōdhiyenalnegaḷdaṁ lakṣmīdharadaṇḍē
śanamaḷakī¨rtti vṛtāṁśaṁ . tadanuje . svakuḷajaḷanidhi śaraccaṁdrikeyeṁbudanamaḷabhāvadiṁ kuvaḷaya ha¨rṣa karaprabhāvadiṁ tāṁ prakaṭisuva
ḷ laḷiyādēviyinī jagadoḷ . tadanujanesedaṁ kāntāmadanaṁ mahanīyadāni lakṣmī līlāsadanaṁ sūnṛta viḷasadvadanaṁ jōgēśvaraṁ camūpala
lāmaṁ . mattaṁ tatsahōdaraṁ . pollame po¨rdda sucarita kkavaṇaṁ sallada nuḍiyeṁbinituṁ mallugidaṁḍādhināthano
ḷnijavalte . va . Antu sakaḷa bāndhava janajanita santatōtka¨rṣaha yācaka cātaka prakara kanakava¨rṣanumenisi . v® . kuḷaja dhanyanoldō
lagisida manujaṁ dhanyanādaṁ vinōdakkoḷagādaṁ dhanyanādā ṟidoḷdhanyanentu kaḷegoṁḍaṁ dhanyanāḷda kṣitipati piriduṁ dhanyanaṁ
bī jaganmaṁgaḷamaṁ sāma¨rtthyamaṁ tāḷdidanamaḷayaśaṁ dhanya daṁḍādhināthaṁ . kaṁ . janavinuta tatpratikaṁṭhanudārana mēru mērunagadhai¨ryyaṁ pā
vanataracaritaṁ caritā¨rtthanenippaṁ malladēvanamaḷinabhāvaṁ . v® . sa[k®] boppaṇa nāyakaṁ paramadha¨rmmāhlādi mādēvanāyaka
nā rēvaṇanāyakaṁ parahitavyāpāra sārakriyādhikṛtaṁ boppaṇanāyakaṁ viśada tējō mū¨rtti mā¨rttaṇḍanāyakaneṁbayvaru moḷpuve
tta karaṇaṁgaḷ khyātiyaṁ tāḷdidar . va . Antu sakaḷani¨rmmaḷa dha¨rmmādhikaraṇaṁgaḷu ma hmabrāhmaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkaraṇaṁgaḷumenipaśēṣa
karaṇaṁgaḷverasu dhannugidēvadaṁḍanāyaka¨rbbeḷvaladēśamaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭānugrahō dagrasāmagriyinavyagratege salisi parama
pramōdadiṁ pratipāḷisuttami¨rppa kāladoḷ . ka . Anupama vanitānidhi sajjananidhi nānā padā¨rtthanidhi viḷasannaṁdananidhi dēvālayanidhiyenisidu
daṇnigeṟe satsukhaikanivāsaṁ . Adaroḷsogayisuvudu guṇasadanaṁ gāvuṇḍava¨rggavādvija va¨rggaṁ vidita vaṇika va¨rggaṁ sadabhīṣṭutavī triva¨rggava
maḷinamā¨rggaṁ . mattamalli . v® . samayaṁ tānene paṭṭasāligara mottaṁ kī¨rtti vetti¨rddudāsamayakkaṁ paḍevaḷḷanoḷpinudayādityaṁ mahau
dā¨ryya vikrama vibhrājitanādana tantuvāyānvaya kṣēmasaṁrakṣaṇa dakṣaveṁbadaṭiniṁ mūnūṟu baṁdoppuguṁ . va . Antanū
namā nija dānavāda catu¨ryyugarājadhāniyaṇnigeṟeya riya gāvuṇḍike ḍeyarenisi pesa
rāṁta gāvuṇḍaranvayadoḷ . Adaṁteṁdaḍe . kaḍu vīra śrī ya gāvuṁḍana putraṁ śōbhana gāvuṇḍanātana putraṁ bamma gāvuṁḍana tatusūnu paṭṭaṇa
prabhu mahāpasāyitaṁ karaṇādhiṣṭādhināyakaṁ mūkayyagāvuṁḍanātana mahi yaṁteṁdaḍe raṟeyaluke negaḷdana
yaguṇaṁ mūkagāvuṇḍanalliṁ baḷika śrīyoḍeyanātanaḷiya gā vuṁḍanoḷpaṁtaḷedanātana taneyaṁ bhuvanaparītayaśaṁ
jjagauḍanāvibhuvina jāmātri budhanikara naga¨rdanaṟike yaṟamagauḍaṁ . Ī vasumatiyoḷageṟeyamagauvuṁḍana sati
śiṣṭakulavati guṇabhūśāvati vivēkasati śōbhāvati maḷeyavati nega¨rdaḷabaḷāra�na . Avari¨rvva¨rgge puṭṭida navadātta yaśaṁ semastaguṇagaṇa
līḷābhavanaṁ svātrita rakṣaṇa niviṣṭamati nāgagauvuṇḍanāhavaśauṇḍaṁ . mattaṁ . guṇadoḷu gāṁbhī¨ryyadoḷu dhai¨ryyadoḷamaḷina cāritradoḷu bandhusaṁrakṣa
ṇadoḷdākṣiṇyadoḷu puṇyadoḷabhavalasadbhaktiyoḷsūktiyoḷmā¨rggaṇavāṁccā ḷdānadoḷavaniyoḷī nāgagāvuṇḍanoḷpoḷeṇeyāvaṁ nōḷpaḍaṁdaṁ
dakhiḷabudhajanaṁ baṇnikuṁ prītiyiṁdaṁ . yenenegaḷda nāgagāvuṇḍananiṁdyaṁ bhaktiyiṁde nāgēśvaradēva nivāsamanaṇnigeṟege vinūta tiḷakāyamānamaṁ
māḍisida . Anantaraṁ śrīmatu kaḷacu¨ryyacakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sōvidēvana besadiṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ dhannugidēva pramukha samastakaraṇaṁga
ḷuṁ triva¨rgga samayasāsi¨rvvaruṁ purapaṭṭaṇada sannidhānadalu śrīmannāgēśvara dēvā lyada māṭakūṭa prāsādakkaṁ Aṁgebhōgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ tapō
dhanarāhāradāna vidyādānakkaṁ gītanādyanrityamannadānaminita¨rkkaṁ sa¨rvvanamasya sa [¨rbā]bādha parihāravāgi suva¨rṇnapurassara dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ
māḍipaḍedu sakava¨rṣa 1095 neya nandana saṁvatsara puśyaṣuddha 5 sōmavāra vuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpāta puṇyatithiyoḷu śrīmannā
gēśvaradēvarige dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi nāgagāvuṇḍaṁ tanna gāvuṇḍavoladoḷage paṁcō ttaramaniḷipikoṭṭa mattaru nānnūṟayvattara sīmā saṁmaṁ
dhaveṁteṁdaḍe vūriṁ paḍuva hebbasuṟa baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga baḷḷāruvāḍada holada sīmeyiṁ mūḍa tōḷa baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka bhōgā dēvara
cchatrada keyyiṁ heggeṟeya keyyiṁ paḍuva mattaṁ mūḍa mokhadeyā heggeṟeya keyyiṁ mūḍamokhade baṁdu pa
ḍuva mukhade harida haḷḷadiṁ śrībhōgēśvaradēvarige yikkida
śvarada yiṁmattaṟu keyyiṁ paḍuvalu śrī yamritēśvaradēvara paḍihāṟa cāvaṇana keyyiṁda baḍaga matta
vā cāvaṇana keyyiṁdaṁ śrī yamritēśvaradēvara cchatrada keyyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu Aḷedikkida mūvattumūṟu gēṇuṁ bā¨rciviḍigaḍiṁbada gha
ḷeyalaḷeda mattarinnūṟa mūvatteraḍaṟoḷage paṁcōttarada mattaru mūvatteraḍaniḷipi niṁda mattaru yiṁnūṟu Adoṁdu sthaḷa
matta vūriṁ baḍaga naviluguṁdada baṭṭeyiṁda gāvuṇḍavoladiṁ teṁkalayyamavaṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu śrī dhōrēśvaraholadiṁ baḍaga
lu mattaru nūṟippattaṟoḷage paṁcōttarada mattarippattanuḷiye niṁda mattaru nūṟuva doṁdu sthaḷa . matta maṇikavāḍada baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka
rōṇēśvaradēvara kaiyyiṁdaṁ kuṁdugoḷada baṭṭeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mattaṁ kuṁdugoḷada baṭṭeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu dhōrēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ
daṁ mūḍalu mā¨rttaṁḍabhaṭṭara keyyiṁdaṁ teṁkalā kaiyyiṁdaṁ mūḍalākeyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalākeyyiṁdaṁ mūḍalaḷeda mattaru
Ayvattaṟoḷage paṁcōttarada mattareṁṭanuḷiye niṁda mattaru nālvatteraḍu Adoṁdusthaḷa . voriṁ paḍuva hebbasuṟa ba
ṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalu śrī yamritēśvaradēvara soḷavoladiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu dasavandada naḍuve pāseṟegallu modalāgi Aṇneya
holadiṁdaṁ baḍagalu sisuvanahāḷa bennūra mugguḍḍe modalāge baḍaga mokade bare bennūra holada
mugguḍḍeyiṁ mūḍalaḷedikkida mattaru Ayvatta ṟoḷage paṁcōta rada mattareṁṭanuḷiye niṁda matta
śrīyamritēśvaradēvara keyyiṁdaṁ baḍaga dēvara vitīpātada keyyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
haḍavaḷaravarige taḷāṟikege yikkida mattarāṟu
śrīgandhada keyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu gavuḍavoladiṁdaṁ mū
rada mattaroṁda niḷipiThe stone is broken off after this.
Digital edition of SII 15.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
